name: wled-usermod-sensors-i2c
description: Combined I2C environmental sensor usermod for the common 3-in-1 breakout (HTU21D temp/humidity, BMP180 pressure, BH1750FVI lux); can drive WLED auto-brightness from ambient light, with optional MQTT / Home Assistant publishing.
keywords: wled, usermod, sensors, i2c, htu21d, bmp180, bh1750, temperature, humidity, pressure, lux, auto-brightness, mqtt, home assistant, esp32
